charter: Planning revision still incomplete. Revise PM_SIGNOFF.md, SYSTEM_SPEC.md, and ROADMAP.md to address the actual human feedback, not just internal contradictions. Required changes: (1) V1 must include minimal domain grouping instead of describing V1 as strict 1 route to 1 capability only; keep it narrow, but do not cut skill/domain grouping entirely. (2) Clarify the product claim around tusq serve so the docs are honest about whether V1 proves AI-callable execution or only describe-only MCP exposure; if V1 is still describe-only, say explicitly that V1 proves discovery plus manifest plus MCP exposure, not full executable capability delivery. (3) In PM_SIGNOFF.md explicitly state that runtime learning is a deferred core pillar of the product, not just a normal omitted feature. Make the planning package faithful to VISION.md while keeping V1 disciplined.
acceptance_contract: PM_SIGNOFF.md describes minimal domain grouping in V1 instead of pure 1:1 capability mapping
SYSTEM_SPEC.md and ROADMAP.md clearly and honestly describe whether V1 proves execution or only MCP exposure
PM_SIGNOFF.md explicitly names runtime learning as a deferred core pillar tied back to the vision
